string.text: I had hoped a former sawmill would have some machinery left, but there's nothing but rotting logs. I could use some tools to work with. If you can find basic ones, please bring to me.
I had hoped a former sawmill would have some machinery left, but there's nothing but rotting logs. I could use some tools to work with. If you can find basic ones, please bring to me.
Thanks. Things are going to be much easier with these. Hey, as thanks, I'll set aside some of my stock for you.
Since you've already found one set of tools, do you happen to know where some more advanced ones are? I desperately need some.
Since you've already found one set of tools, do you happen to know where some more advanced ones are? I desperately need some.
Thank you, thank you. As thanks, I'll give you a small discount and access to some better stuff.
Thank you for everything. Next time I get restocked, you'll get the best selection out of everything I have. Perhaps this wretched place will turn into a fully fledged camp someday.
Lead the way, we'll be right behind you. You'll get your cut when we're done. Just watch our backs while we're filling our pockets.
We should get moving - my trigger finger is getting itchy. Just remember, the loot is ours!
The bandit medic needs %s to work on medical supplies.

I'm scraping the bottom of the barrel, trying to find enough bandages and medkits for everyone who gets injured every day. We're about to find out what happens when we don't have any meds left, if I can't get one of those old drug-making kits.
I've been looking all over for a %s. It's got the stuff I need to make my own meds and supplies. I'll pay you well for one of those kits, if you can get me a full set.
Limpid needs %s to install basic equipment upgrades.
Perfect! This is just what I need, man. I can properly upgrade gear now! I'll make sure you get access to the good stuff next time you're back.
Limpid needs %s to install advanced equipment upgrades.
You followed through again! Good deal man. One friend to another, I'll make sure you get dibs on my next restock.
Limpid needs %s to install expert equipment upgrades.
You followed through again! Good deal, man, here's some cash for your trouble. And I'll make sure you're the best-equipped member of the crew, just come by after my next shipment.
There are a few guys who need someone to take them out shopping, if you catch my drift. Scout out some prime targets for them, and you'll get a nice cut when the job is done.

This one's a cinch. Sultan's got a mind to shake down a nearby stalker camp, shake things up, remind them who's in charge around here. You'll need to get your own little gang together for this, but there's a big prize in it for you if you can pull it off.
Ha! Well done! I hope you stripped them bare and got your fill of their loot. Here's a little extra from me.
So they tried to pay you with bullets, huh? Typical free loaders. As for you, here's your prize.
